home.title: Project ready!
home.intro: You may now add components and start building.
home.componentNote: We've already added the button component for you.

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Manage staff members and their weekly availability.
staff.emptyDescription: Add your first staff member to start building schedules.
staff.newDescription: Add staff details and Monday-Friday availability.
staff.editDescription: Update staff details and Monday-Friday availability.

form.detailsDescription: These fields describe the staff member.
form.availabilityDescription: Leave a weekday empty when the staff member is not available that day.

detail.groupsDescription: Groups this staff member can be scheduled in.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Manage groups and their minimum staffing rules.
groups.emptyDescription: Add your first group to define staffing needs.
groups.newDescription: Add a group name and Monday-Friday staff rules.
groups.editDescription: Update the group name and staff rules.

form.name: Name
form.rulesDescription: Add the minimum staffing needed for each weekday time range.

detail.subtitle: Minimum staffing rules
detail.staffDescription: Active staff members linked to this group.
detail.noStaff: No staff members have been linked.
detail.allStaffLinked: All active staff members are already linked.
detail.noRules: No staff rules have been added.

shiftSchedule.title: Shift schedule
shiftSchedule.description: Preview the group data that will be used to generate a shift schedule.
shiftSchedule.emptyDescription: Choose a group to preview linked staff, availability, and staff rules as JSON.
shiftSchedule.noGroups: Create a group before previewing shift schedule data.
shiftSchedule.generatedDescription: Generate a preview plan from the selected group's staff, availability, and staffing rules.
shiftSchedule.generatedEmptyDescription: Generate a plan to see validated AI output here.
shiftSchedule.invalidGroup: The selected group id is not valid. Choose a group from the list.
shiftSchedule.groupNotFound: That group could not be found. Choose another group from the list.
